numerical_reasoning.name: Revenue Growth Calculation
numerical_reasoning.text: The decrease in Investment Banking segment revenue was primarily driven by lower trading volumes and reduced M&A advisory fees due to market uncertainty.
numerical_reasoning.question: What was the percentage change in total revenue from 2022 to 2023?

numerical_reasoning.text: The company maintained a strong capital position throughout 2023.
numerical_reasoning.question: Calculate the debt-to-equity ratio for 2023 and compare to 2022.

numerical_reasoning.name: Efficiency Ratio

numerical_reasoning.question: What is the efficiency ratio for Q4 2023 vs Q4 2022?

numerical_reasoning.text: Profitability improved driven by higher net interest income.

numerical_reasoning.name: YoY Growth by Region
numerical_reasoning.text: Asia Pacific emerged as the fastest-growing region.
numerical_reasoning.question: Which region had the highest growth rate? Calculate all three.

sentiment_analysis.text: Net interest income grew 12% driven by higher rates and loan growth.
Management expects headwinds from deposit competition to persist.
The company maintained its quarterly dividend of $0.50 per share.
Credit costs increased significantly due to commercial real estate exposure.
Strong demand in core markets contributed to double-digit growth.
Total assets remained relatively unchanged from the prior quarter.
The company lowered full-year guidance citing macroeconomic uncertainty.
Operating margins expanded 150 basis points year-over-year.
